name: Ham Salad Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds fully cooked ham or ring bologna, coarsely ground
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the ham, pickles, mayonnaise, and pimientos in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Spoon about 1/4 cup of the mixture onto 50 slices of bread.
4. If desired, add lettuce on top of the spread.
5. Place remaining slices of bread on top to complete the sandwiches.
